name: Homemade Mayonnaise

ingredients.item: Combine mustard, sugar, pepper, and salt.
Add vinegar and egg yolks and beat together with whisk until well combined.
Add oil one drop at a time, beating constantly.
When mayonnaise starts to thicken, thin with lemon juice and continue beating, alternately adding lemon juice and oil.
